speaker: speaker1
text: I'm searching for an old music box .

speaker: speaker2
text: You came to the right place . Any particular decade ?

speaker: speaker1
text: If you had a box made in the ' 20s , that would be nice .

speaker: speaker2
text: We just got one in yesterday , so now we have six .

speaker: speaker1
text: Would any of them have dancing figures ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , we still have two boxes left that have dancing figures .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , they're both so beautiful . Let me have this one , I think .

speaker: speaker2
text: That one truly is a beautiful piece of work , isn't it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , no . Everything we sell here is " as is . "

speaker: speaker1
text: I guess I was asking for too much .

speaker: speaker2
text: If it breaks down , maybe you can find a repairman on the Internet .
